completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part with 2 parts: mobile (React Native/Expo) and backend (Firebase Cloud Functions)
Config files analyzed: package.json, tsconfig.json, app.json for both parts. Technology stack documented.
Deep scan of critical directories. Mobile: src/features/diagnostics, src/services/firebase, src/shared. Backend: src/controllers, src/services, src/models.

mobile_structure.components: Shared components: AppInput, AppSelect, ConfirmationModal, EditFormModal, etc.
mobile_structure.services: Firebase integration with factory pattern callFn

backend_structure.models: Comprehensive types: UserDocument, VehicleDocument, MaintenanceLog, etc.

completed_steps.summary: API integration points documented. Firebase Auth, Firestore, Cloud Functions callable pattern, Vercel AI SDK integration.

firebase_integration.auth: Firebase Auth with onAuthStateChanged listener in root layout
firebase_integration.firestore: 6 collections: users, vehicles + 4 subcollections (maintenanceLog, tasks, odb2Diagnostics, documents)

completed_steps.summary: Data models and state management patterns documented. Firestore schemas, Zustand stores, AsyncStorage persistence.

data_models.user_document: uid, profile (name, gender, age, country, activeRole), stats, subscriptionTier, timestamps
data_models.vehicle_document: id, ownerId, data (brand, model, year, licensePlate, currentKm), timestamps
data_models.maintenance_log: id, type, description, kmAtService, cost, performedAt, notes
data_models.obd2_diagnostic: id, description, kmAtService, performedAt, notes (JSON with DTCs + telemetry)
data_models.vehicle_document_entry: id, type (DRIVERS_LICENSE, TECHNICAL_INSPECTION, INSURANCE_POLICY), expirationDate, notificationEnabled

state_management.diagnostic_store: status, liveData, foundDTCs, scanCompleted, supportedPids, fuelType, odometer

completed_steps.summary: Features and user flows documented. Authentication flow, vehicle management, OBD2 diagnostics, IA task suggestions.

key_flows: Authentication: WelcomeScreen → Login/Register → onboarding-profile → onboarding-vehicle → HomeScreen
Vehicle Management: VehiclesScreen → AddVehicle → VehicleDetail (tabs: Info, Maintenance, Diagnostics, Documents, Tasks)
OBD2 Diagnosis: DiagnosticsScreen → Preflight Checklist → LiveSession → Scan DTCs → Save/Interpret
IA Suggestions (PREMIUM): vehicle-detail → WandButton → Cloud Function (gpt-4o-mini with Córdoba mechanic persona) → Modal result

features.authentication: Firebase Auth with displayName as completion flag
features.profile_switch: CLIENT ↔ BUSINESS role switching with AsyncStorage persistence
features.obd2_integration: Strategy Pattern (BluetoothClassic Android, BLE iOS pending, Mock for dev)
features.ai_features: DTC interpretation, maintenance task suggestions (PREMIUM only)
features.rate_limiting: 60s cooldown between IA calls, tracked via lastAiUsage timestamp

completed_steps.summary: Comprehensive documentation compiled. Created index.md, mobile-architecture.md, backend-architecture.md. Updated project-scan-report.json.
outputs: docs/index.md - Master index with navigation and guides
docs/project-scan-report.json - This file (updated with all findings)

completeness.crud_operations: Complete for vehicles, maintenance, tasks, documents

next_steps: Maintain index.md as central knowledge hub
Track new phases in project_fase*.md files
